data.title: Ampace Is Advancing AI Continuity Infrastructure at DCW London 2026
data.description: On March 5, 2026 in London, it was reported that AI workloads are significantly impacting data center power systems, leading to increased instability. The rising rack densities, quick shifts in GPU loads, and growing thermal pressures are posing challenges to maintaining consistent power and operational reliability. This situation underscores the importance of ensuring uninterrupted energy supply in data centers to mitigate these issues.

data.title: Eimskip – Market making agreement with Arion
data.description: Eimskipafélag Íslands hf. has recently signed a market-making agreement with Arion Bank in which the bank will provide bid and ask offers for the company's shares on a daily basis on the Nasdaq Iceland trading system. This deal aims to enhance liquidity for the company's shares, facilitate market price determination, and maintain efficient and transparent price formation for the shares. This move will potentially boost trading activities and investor confidence in the company's shares.

data.title: China Cycle 2026: Building a Global Platform to Advance Global Cooperation and Innovation
data.description: The upcoming China International Bicycle Fair 2026, known as China Cycle 2026, is scheduled to take place from May 5 to May 8, 2026 at the Shanghai New International Expo Centre (SNIEC). The event will capitalize on China's prominent role in the bicycle industry as a key global hub.
